---
title: MAG Overview
subtitle: SpringBloom2021 - Genome-resolved Metaproteomic Dataset
date: 09.04.2025
author: Cyrill Hofer
output:
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    highlight: tango
    self_contained: true
    code_folding: hide
    thumbnails: true
    gallery: false
    fig_width: 15
    df_print: kable
    fig_caption: yes
    use_bookdown: true
    css: custom.css
---

# Data Preparation
- Note: This data does not contain and protein identifications from contaminants
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}
# Clear R's Brain
rm(list = ls())

# Set the working directory
setwd("/SynologyDrive/PhD/Projects/SpringBloom2021/DataAnalysis_SpringBloom2021/Figure_01/MagOverview/")

# Load the libraries
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)
library(plotly)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(forcats)
library(patchwork)

# Load the color palette
source("ColorPalette.R")

# Load the data
dat <- read_csv(file = "MagOverview.csv")
```

# Mag Quality Plot before dereplication
```{r}
#–– 1) classify quality ––
dat$Quality <- with(dat,
  ifelse(Completeness >= 90 & Contamination <= 5, "High_Quality",
  ifelse(Completeness >= 50 & Contamination <= 10, "Medium_Quality", NA)))

df <- subset(dat, Quality %in% c("Medium_Quality","High_Quality"))
df$Quality <- factor(df$Quality, levels=c("Medium_Quality","High_Quality"))

#–– 2) palette ––
cols <- c(Medium_Quality = ColorPalette[8], High_Quality   = ColorPalette[7])

#–– 3) top marginal: completeness histogram ––
p_top <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Completeness, fill = Quality)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, colour = "black", show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(50, 100, by = 5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(50, 100), ylim = c(0, 500)) +
  ylab("MAGs [n]") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.x  = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x  = element_blank()) 

#–– 4) main scatter: Completeness → x, Contamination → y ––
p_scatter <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Completeness, y = Contamination, fill = Quality)) +
  geom_point(shape  = 21, colour = "black", stroke = 0.5, size   = 2, alpha  = 0.8) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(50, 100, by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  labs(x = "Completeness (%)", y = "Contamination (%)") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(50, 100), ylim = c(0, 5)) +
  theme_bw() 

#–– 5) right marginal: contamination histogram ––
p_right <- ggplot(df, aes(y = Contamination, fill = Quality)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth    = 0.5, orientation = "y", colour = "black", show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5), xlim = c(0, 400)) +
  xlab("MAGs [n]") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y  = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank())

#–– 6) assemble with patchwork ––

layout <- "
.A
BC
"

final_all_mags <- p_top + plot_spacer() + p_scatter + p_right +
  plot_layout(design  = layout, widths  = c(4, 1), heights = c(1, 4), guides  = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title    = "MAG Quality: Completeness vs Contamination",
    subtitle = paste("MAGs before dereplication at species level, n = ", n_distinct(dat$MAG_ID)),
    theme    = theme(plot.title    = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))) &
  theme(legend.position = "right")

final_all_mags

#–– 9) Export as square PDF (21 × 21 cm ≃ A4 width) ––
ggsave(filename = "MAG_quality_plot_before_dereplication.pdf",
  plot = final_all_mags,
  device = cairo_pdf,
  width    = 21,          
  height   = 19,          
  units    = "cm",
  dpi      = 300)

```

```{r}
#–– 1) Filter & classify quality ––
dat_after <- dat %>%
  filter(Species_ID == MAG_ID)

dat_after$Quality <- with(dat_after,
  ifelse(Completeness >= 90 & Contamination <= 5,  "High_Quality",
  ifelse(Completeness >= 50 & Contamination <= 10, "Medium_Quality", NA)))

df <- subset(dat_after, Quality %in% c("Medium_Quality","High_Quality"))
df$Quality <- factor(df$Quality, levels = c("Medium_Quality","High_Quality"))

#–– 2) Palette ––
cols <- c(Medium_Quality = ColorPalette[8], High_Quality   = ColorPalette[7])

#–– 3) Top marginal: completeness histogram (no legend) ––
p_top <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Completeness, fill = Quality)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 5, width = 4.5, colour = "black", show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(50, 100, by = 5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(50, 100), ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  ylab("MAGs [n]") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x   = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x  = element_blank(),

    axis.title.y  = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text.y   = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.ticks.y  = element_line(),

    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank()
  )

#–– 4) Right marginal: contamination histogram (no legend) ––
p_right <- ggplot(df, aes(y = Contamination, fill = Quality)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.5, width = 0.45, orientation = "y", colour = "black", show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5, by = 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 5), xlim = c(0, 100)) +
  xlab("MAGs [n]") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y  = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y   = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y  = element_blank(),

    axis.title.x  = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text.x   = element_text(),
    axis.ticks.x  = element_line(),

    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank()
  )

#–– 5) Prepare fixed size‐legend bins for MAGs per species ––
breaks <- seq(5, 35, by = 5)
labels <- paste0(seq(0, 30, by = 5), "–", breaks)

#–– 6) Main scatter: size by MAGsPerSpecies, two legends ––
p_scatter <- ggplot(df, aes(x = Completeness, y = Contamination, fill = Quality, size = MAGs_Per_Species)) +
  geom_point(shape  = 21, colour = "black", stroke = 0.5, alpha  = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Quality", values = cols) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "MAGs per species", range  = c(1, 6), breaks = breaks, labels = labels) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(order = 1), size = guide_legend(order = 2)) +
  labs(x = "Completeness (%)", y = "Contamination (%)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(50, 100, by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 5,    by = 1)) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(50, 100), ylim = c(0, 5)) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.title     = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text      = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.ticks     = element_line())

#–– 7) Assemble with patchwork + title/subtitle ––
layout <- "
.A
BC
"

final_after_derep <- p_top + plot_spacer() + p_scatter + p_right +
  plot_layout(design = layout, widths = c(4, 1), heights = c(1, 4), guides = "collect") +
  #plot_annotation(title = "MAG Quality: Completeness vs Contamination", subtitle = paste("MAGs after dereplication at species level, n =", n_distinct(dat_after$MAG_ID)), 
  #                theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5), plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5))) & 
  theme(legend.position = "right")

#–– 8) Draw ––
print(final_after_derep)


#–– 9) Export as square PDF (21 × 21 cm ≃ A4 width) ––
ggsave(filename = "MAG_quality_plot_after_dereplication.pdf",
  plot = final_after_derep,
  device = pdf,
  width    = 21,          
  height   = 10,          
  units    = "cm",
  dpi      = 300)

```

```{r}
# 1) Tag before/after
pre  <- dat  %>% mutate(Stage = "All MAGs")
post <- dat_after %>% mutate(Stage = "Species MAGs")

# 2) Combine & pivot
df2 <- bind_rows(pre, post) %>%
  select(Stage, Completeness, Contamination, Quality) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Completeness, Contamination), names_to  = "Metric", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Stage = factor(Stage, levels = c("All MAGs","Species MAGs")))

# 3) Quality palette
cols <- c(Medium_Quality = ColorPalette[8], High_Quality = ColorPalette[7])

# 4) sizes
box_width <- 0.7

# 5) Plot
dereplication_comparison <- ggplot(df2, aes(x = Stage, y = Value)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(fill = Quality), width  = box_width/2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.5, shape = 21, stroke = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot(width = box_width, fill = NA, color = "black", outlier.shape = NA, size = 0.75) +
  facet_wrap(~ Metric, scales = "free_y", labeller = as_labeller(c(Completeness  = "Completeness (%)", Contamination = "Contamination (%)"))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols, name = "Quality") +
  labs(title = "MAG completeness & contamination\nbefore vs after species-level clustering", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right")

#–– 8) Draw ––
print(dereplication_comparison)


#–– 9) Export as square PDF (21 × 21 cm ≃ A4 width) ––
ggsave(filename = "Plot_dereplication_comparison.pdf",
  plot = dereplication_comparison,
  device = cairo_pdf,
  width    = 21,          
  height   = 29.7,          
  units    = "cm",
  dpi      = 300)
```


```{r}
# 1) Prepare df_after as before
df_after <- dat %>%
  filter(Species_ID == MAG_ID) %>%
  mutate(Quality = case_when(Completeness >= 90 & Contamination <= 5  ~ "High", 
                             Completeness >= 50 & Contamination <= 10 ~ "Medium", TRUE ~ NA_character_)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Quality)) %>%
  mutate(Quality = factor(Quality, levels = c("Medium","High")))

# 2) Build bar‐df & compute percent within each ANI_Status
bar_df <- df_after %>%
  mutate(ANI_Status = if_else(is.na(ANI_To_Reference), "Unclassified", "Species Level")) %>%
  count(ANI_Status, Quality) %>%
  group_by(ANI_Status) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n) * 100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(ANI_Status = factor(ANI_Status, levels = c("Unclassified","Species Level")))

# 3) Build bar‐df for 16S
bar16_df <- df_after %>%
  mutate(`16S` = if_else(Nr_16s > 0, "16S present", "16S absent")) %>%
  count(`16S`, Quality) %>%
  group_by(`16S`) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n) * 100) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(`16S` = factor(`16S`, levels = c("16S absent","16S present")))

# 4) Scatter data
scatter_df <- df_after %>%
  filter(!is.na(ANI_To_Reference))

# 5) Palette
palQ <- c(Medium = ColorPalette[8], High = ColorPalette[7])

# 6) Left panel: ANI
p_bar <- ggplot(bar_df, aes(ANI_Status, n, fill = Quality)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, colour = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct,1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), colour = "black", size = 5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palQ, name = "MAG Quality") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 350, by = 50), limits = c(0, 350), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of MAGs") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,5,5),
        legend.position= "top",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

# 7) Middle panel: 16S
p_16s <- ggplot(bar16_df, aes(`16S`, n, fill = Quality)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, colour = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct,1), "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), colour = "black", size = 5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palQ, name = "MAG Quality") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 350, by = 50), limits = c(0, 350), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,5,5),
        legend.position = "none",
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

# 8) Right panel: ANI scatter
p_ani <- ggplot(scatter_df, aes(Quality, ANI_To_Reference, fill = Quality)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, size = 2, alpha = 0.7, color = "black", stroke = 0.3, shape = 21) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palQ, guide = "none") +
  labs(x = "MAG Quality", y = "ANI to Reference (%)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(95, 100)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(95, 100, by = 1)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
        plot.margin = margin(5,5,5,5),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())

# 9) Combine & annotate
final_taxonomic_resolution <- p_bar + p_16s + p_ani +
  plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1, 1.2)) +
  plot_annotation(title = "Species-level MAGs: Taxonomic Resolution",
                  subtitle = "Left: ANI classified vs unclassified; middle: 16S presence; right: ANI similarity",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5)))

# 10) Print & export
print(final_taxonomic_resolution)

ggsave(filename = "Plot_taxonomic_resolution.pdf",
       plot = final_taxonomic_resolution,
       device = cairo_pdf,
       width = 21,
       height = 29.7,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```



```{r}
# 1) Prepare representatives (after dereplication), including cluster size
reps <- dat %>%
  filter(Species_ID == MAG_ID) %>%
  mutate(Quality = case_when(Completeness >= 90 & Contamination <= 5  ~ "High",
                             Completeness >= 50 & Contamination <= 10 ~ "Medium", TRUE ~ NA_character_)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Quality)) %>%
  select(Species_ID,
         Completeness_rep = Completeness,
         Contamination_rep = Contamination,
         MAGs_Per_Species,
         Quality)

# 2) Compute per‐cluster medians (excluding NAs)
medians <- dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(Completeness), !is.na(Contamination)) %>%
  group_by(Species_ID) %>%
  summarise(med_Comp = median(Completeness, na.rm = TRUE), 
            med_Cont = median(Contamination,  na.rm = TRUE), .groups   = "drop")

# 3) Join medians ↔ reps & calculate deltas
df_delta_med <- medians %>%
  inner_join(reps, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  mutate(ΔComp = Completeness_rep - med_Comp,
         ΔCont = med_Cont - Contamination_rep)

# 4) Define palette
palQ <- c(Medium = ColorPalette[8], High = ColorPalette[7])

# 5) Bin the cluster sizes into 0–5, 5–10, …, 30–35
df_delta_med <- df_delta_med %>%
  mutate(size_cat = cut(MAGs_Per_Species, 
                        breaks = seq(0, 35, by = 5),
                        labels = paste0(seq(0, 30, by = 5), "-", seq(5, 35, by = 5)),
                        include.lowest = TRUE))

# 6) Plot using medians
Plot_ClusterImprovement <- ggplot(df_delta_med, aes(x = ΔComp, y = ΔCont)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60") +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Quality, size = size_cat), alpha  = 0.8, shape  = 21, color  = "black", stroke = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = palQ, name = "MAG Quality") +
  scale_size_manual(name = "MAGs per species", values = setNames(seq(2, 8, length.out = 7), levels(df_delta_med$size_cat))) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(floor(min(df_delta_med$ΔComp)), ceiling(max(df_delta_med$ΔComp)), by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(floor(min(df_delta_med$ΔCont)), ceiling(max(df_delta_med$ΔCont)), by = 1)) +
  labs(x = expression(Delta~"Completeness"~"(rep−median) [%]"),
       y = expression(Delta~"Contamination"~"(median−rep) [%]"),
       title = "Species Representative vs Cluster Median Quality") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(min(df_delta_med$ΔComp), max(df_delta_med$ΔComp)),
                  ylim = c(min(df_delta_med$ΔCont), max(df_delta_med$ΔCont))) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10))

# 7) Print & export
print(Plot_ClusterImprovement)

ggsave(filename = "Plot_ClusterImprovement.pdf",
       plot = Plot_ClusterImprovement,
       device = cairo_pdf,
       width = 29.7,
       height = 21,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)

```


```{r}
# 1) Identify offending clusters
bad_species <- df_delta_med %>%
  filter(ΔComp < 0, ΔCont < 0) %>%
  distinct(Species_ID) %>%
  pull(Species_ID)

# 2) Prepare reps including their contig count
reps <- dat %>%
  filter(MAG_ID == Species_ID, Species_ID %in% bad_species) %>%
  mutate(Quality = case_when(Completeness >= 90 & Contamination <= 5  ~ "High",
                             Completeness >= 50 & Contamination <= 10 ~ "Medium", TRUE ~ NA_character_)) %>%
  select(Species_ID, Completeness_rep = Completeness, Contamination_rep = Contamination, Contigs_rep = Nr_Contigs,Quality)

# 3) Pull all MAGs in those clusters and join rep info
plot_df <- dat %>%
  filter(Species_ID %in% bad_species) %>%
  left_join(reps, by = "Species_ID") %>%
  mutate(is_rep = MAG_ID == Species_ID,Species = factor(Species_ID, levels = bad_species), contig_count = if_else(is_rep, Contigs_rep, Nr_Contigs))

# 4) Assign each species its own fill color
species_fills <- setNames(
  ColorPalette[seq_along(bad_species)],
  bad_species)

# 5) Plot: spokes + points sized by contig_count
ProblematicRepresentative <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = filter(plot_df, !is_rep),aes(x = Completeness,
                                                   y = Contamination,
                                                   xend = Completeness_rep,
                                                   yend = Contamination_rep,
                                                   color = Species),
               size  = 0.3,
               alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_point(
    data = filter(plot_df, !is_rep),aes(x = Completeness,
                                        y = Contamination,
                                        fill = Species,
                                        size = contig_count),
    shape  = 21,
    color  = "black",
    stroke = 0.5,
    alpha  = 0.8 ) +
  geom_point(data = filter(plot_df, is_rep),aes(x = Completeness_rep, 
                                                y = Contamination_rep,
                                                fill = Species,
                                                size = contig_count),
    shape  = 24,
    color  = "black",
    stroke = 0.8,
    alpha  = 0.9) +
  scale_color_manual(values = species_fills, guide = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = species_fills, name = "Species cluster") +
  scale_size_continuous(name  = "Nr of contigs", range = c(2, 8)) +
  labs(title = "Problematic Representative",
       subtitle = "MAGs connected to their representative",
       x = "Completeness (%)",
       y = "Contamination (%)") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "right")



# 7) Print & export
print(ProblematicRepresentative)

ggsave(filename = "Plot_ProblematicRepresentative.pdf",
       plot = ProblematicRepresentative,
       device = cairo_pdf,
       width = 29.7,
       height = 21,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
# 1) Recompute df_after (Quality + ANI status + 16S presence)
df_after <- dat %>%
  filter(Species_ID == MAG_ID) %>%
  mutate(
    Quality    = case_when(
                   Completeness >= 90 & Contamination <= 5   ~ "High",
                   Completeness >= 50 & Contamination <= 10  ~ "Medium",
                   TRUE                                      ~ NA_character_
                 ),
    ANI_Status = if_else(is.na(ANI_To_Reference),
                         "Unclassified",
                         "Species Level"),
    `16S`      = if_else(Nr_16s > 0, "16S present", "16S absent")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Quality)) %>%
  mutate(
    ANI_Status = factor(ANI_Status, levels = c("Unclassified","Species Level")),
    `16S`      = factor(`16S`,      levels = c("16S absent","16S present"))
  )

# 2) Summarize counts & percents by ANI_Status + 16S
bar_ani_16s <- df_after %>%
  count(ANI_Status, `16S`) %>%
  group_by(ANI_Status) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n) * 100) %>%
  ungroup()

# 3) Define colors: gray for absent, your palette for present
pal16s <- c("16S absent"  = ColorPalette[8],
            "16S present" = ColorPalette[7])

# 4) Plot
plot_16s_ani_narrow <- ggplot(bar_ani_16s, aes(x = n, y = ANI_Status, fill = `16S`)) +
  # full‐height bars
  geom_col(width = 0.8, color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct, 1), "%")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size     = 6,
            color    = "black",
            hjust    = 0.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal16s, name = "16S status") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    name   = "Number of MAGs",
    breaks = seq(0, 350, 50),
    limits = c(0, 380),
    labels = comma) +
  scale_y_discrete(
    name   = "ANI Classification",
    expand = expansion(add = c(0, 0))    # zero vertical padding
  ) +
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title.x       = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    plot.margin        = unit(c(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5), "lines")
  )

print(plot_16s_ani_narrow)

# Vertical‐bar version with ANI_Status on x and n on y
plot_16s_ani_vertical <- ggplot(bar_ani_16s, aes(x = ANI_Status, y = n, fill = `16S`)) +
  # full‐height bars, same width/spacing
  geom_col(width = 0.8, colour = "black") +
  # stacked‐bar percentages
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct, 1), "%")),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            size     = 6,
            color    = "black") +
  # same fill palette
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal16s, name = "16S status") +
  # y axis now shows counts
  scale_y_continuous(
    name   = "Number of MAGs",
    breaks = seq(0, 350, 50),
    limits = c(0, 380),
    labels = scales::comma
  ) +
  # x axis is the discrete ANI_Status
  scale_x_discrete(
    name   = "ANI Classification",
    expand = expansion(add = c(0, 0))
  ) +
  labs(title = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    axis.text.x        = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title.x       = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    plot.margin        = unit(c(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5), "lines")
  )

print(plot_16s_ani_vertical)


ggsave(filename = "Plot_16sAniOverview.pdf",
       plot = plot_16s_ani_vertical,
       device = pdf,
       height = 29,
       width = 7,
       units = "cm",
       dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
# Total species-representative MAGs (after dereplication)
n_total <- nrow(dat_after)

# >90% completeness & <1% contamination
hq90 <- dat_after %>%
  filter(Completeness >= 90, Contamination <= 5)
n_hq90 <- nrow(hq90)
pct_hq90 <- 100 * n_hq90 / n_total

# >95% completeness & <0.5% contamination
hq95 <- dat_after %>%
  filter(Completeness >= 95, Contamination < 0.5)
n_hq95 <- nrow(hq95)
pct_hq95 <- 100 * n_hq95 / n_total

cat(sprintf("Species-representative MAGs (n = %d)\n", n_total))
cat(sprintf(">90%% completeness & <5%% contamination: %d (%.1f%%)\n", n_hq90, pct_hq90))
cat(sprintf(">95%% completeness & <0.5%% contamination: %d (%.1f%%)\n", n_hq95, pct_hq95))



```


```{r}
############################################################
## Fully contained MAG overview summary (species reps only)
## - Uses Species_ID == MAG_ID representatives
## - Quality split: >=90% completeness & <=5% contamination vs the rest
## - MAGs_Per_Species stats (mean, sd, median, IQR) per quality split
## - ANI bins: Unclassified (NA), ANI >=95%, ANI <95% (n and %)
## - 16S presence/absence (n and %)
## - Exports ONE tidy CSV + ONE human-readable TXT
############################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
})

# ---- helpers ----
pct <- function(n, tot) if (tot == 0) NA_real_ else 100 * n / tot
fmt_pct <- function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), "NA", sprintf("%.1f%%", x))

# ---- 0) Representatives after dereplication ----
df <- dat %>%
  filter(Species_ID == MAG_ID) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Completeness), !is.na(Contamination)) %>%
  mutate(
    QualityGroup = if_else(Completeness >= 90 & Contamination <= 5,
                           ">=90% comp & <=5% cont",
                           "<90% comp or >5% cont"),
    ANI_Group = case_when(
      is.na(ANI_To_Reference) ~ "Unclassified",
      ANI_To_Reference >= 95  ~ "ANI >=95%",
      TRUE                    ~ "ANI <95%"
    ),
    `16S_Group` = if_else(Nr_16s > 0, "16S present", "16S absent")
  )

n_total <- nrow(df)

# ---- 1) Quality counts (n, %) ----
quality_counts <- df %>%
  count(Group = QualityGroup, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(percent = pct(n, n_total)) %>%
  mutate(Section = "Quality (>=90% comp & <=5% cont)") %>%
  relocate(Section)

# ---- 2) MAGs_Per_Species stats by quality group ----
mags_stats <- df %>%
  group_by(Group = QualityGroup) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(MAGs_Per_Species)),
    mean   = mean(MAGs_Per_Species, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd     = sd(MAGs_Per_Species, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(MAGs_Per_Species, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR    = IQR(MAGs_Per_Species, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Section = "MAGs_Per_Species stats (by quality group)") %>%
  relocate(Section)

# ---- 3) ANI bins (n, %) ----
ani_counts <- df %>%
  count(Group = ANI_Group, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(percent = pct(n, n_total)) %>%
  mutate(Section = "ANI to reference (bins)") %>%
  relocate(Section)

# ---- 4) 16S presence (n, %) ----
s16_counts <- df %>%
  count(Group = `16S_Group`, name = "n") %>%
  mutate(percent = pct(n, n_total)) %>%
  mutate(Section = "16S presence") %>%
  relocate(Section)

# ---- 5) One tidy CSV (long-form) ----
summary_counts <- bind_rows(quality_counts, ani_counts, s16_counts) %>%
  mutate(percent = round(percent, 3))

readr::write_csv(summary_counts, "MAG_overview_summary_counts.csv")
readr::write_csv(mags_stats,      "MAG_overview_summary_magsPerSpecies_stats.csv")

# ---- 6) One human-readable TXT ----
qc <- quality_counts %>% select(Group, n, percent)
ac <- ani_counts     %>% select(Group, n, percent)
sc <- s16_counts     %>% select(Group, n, percent)

txt <- c(
  "MAG OVERVIEW SUMMARY (species representatives; Species_ID == MAG_ID)",
  paste0("Total species-representative MAGs: n = ", n_total),
  "",
  "== Quality split ==",
  paste0(" - ", qc$Group, ": ", qc$n, " (", fmt_pct(qc$percent), ")"),
  "",
  "== MAGs_Per_Species stats by quality split ==",
  mags_stats %>%
    mutate(line = sprintf(
      " - %s: n=%d; mean=%.2f; sd=%.2f; median=%.2f; IQR=%.2f",
      Group, n, mean, sd, median, IQR
    )) %>%
    pull(line),
  "",
  "== ANI bins (includes Unclassified for NA ANI_To_Reference) ==",
  paste0(" - ", ac$Group, ": ", ac$n, " (", fmt_pct(ac$percent), ")"),
  "",
  "== 16S presence ==",
  paste0(" - ", sc$Group, ": ", sc$n, " (", fmt_pct(sc$percent), ")")
)

writeLines(txt, "MAG_overview_summary.txt")

message("Wrote: MAG_overview_summary_counts.csv")
message("Wrote: MAG_overview_summary_magsPerSpecies_stats.csv")
message("Wrote: MAG_overview_summary.txt")

```
